text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I go with Maruzensky to welcome the new year at
a shrine.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I was thinking of taking a drive on New Year's
Day since the roads are usually clear...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
But it just doesn't feel like New Year's until you
go visit a shrine!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It's the perfect place to make a resolution for the
year and pray for my goal to be achieved!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, my goal is to participate in lots of fun
races!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That's why I have to be more active than ever and
become someone that others can look up to!
choice_data_list: I'll help you every step of the way!
I'll help you every step of the way!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I know you will, Trainer! I'm counting on you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I know you will, Trainer! I'm counting on you.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
So, what exactly should we be focusing on in
order to achieve this goal?
choice_data_list:
We should work on fundamentals, like physical
conditioning.
We should set a well-balanced training regimen.

We should focus on making your best skills
even better.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
"The best ability is availability," they say. Honing
your skills means nothing if you're not healthy
enough to be on the track.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'll try to take care of myself better than
ever before!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: With that settled, let's finish up here, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I see! So you're saying a balanced workout is key
to taking it up a notch!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'm on the job! I'll keep this in mind while
training.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, now that that's decided, let's finish up here!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
If we're talking about my best skills, I'd say my
driving is second to none!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Psych! You were talking about my running skills, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Okay! I'll try to keep that in mind while I'm
training.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: All right then, let's finish up here, shall we?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Whew... Now that we've visited a shrine, it's
finally time to start the new year.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Maruzensky!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year! I hope you have a happy and
healthy year!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah, Happy New Year!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Happy New Year right back at you! ☆ Are you all
going to the shrine too?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's right! I know it's like this every year, but
there are so many folks here I feel I'll get lost!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Your dislike of crowds explains why you're always
so quick to break away from the pack in races!
Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer, did you know? These two are the
bomb!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer, did you know? These two are the
bomb!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Ever since their debut, they've been making
names for themselves. People are calling them
members of the "Ultimate Generation"!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... You're making me blush.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
As your senior, it makes me so happy to see you
cuties doing so well! ♪

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We've grown so much thanks to the friendly
competition we have between us.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
We recognize each other's drive, and that pushes
us to keep trying to surpass one another.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Even if we lose, it just makes us want to win
more the next time, right?

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
And it wasn't only my classmates who lifted me
up.

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
This year, I'm trying to surpass the person I've
watched and admired since before my debut...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Is that... by any chance...

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Yes, Maruzensky. Would you be willing to run a
race with me?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Wow! I can't believe I'm already reaping the
benefits of visiting the shrine so soon!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Whaaat?! G-Grass, are you sure about this?!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure I'm not good enough to face off
against Maruzen yet...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, you won't know for sure until you try, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Also, like Grass said, it's great to have someone
to compete against.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Having someone to compare yourself to,
someone to encourage and be encouraged by... I
believe that's what keeps us running.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: To encourage each other...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It would be such a waste to avoid challenging
each other!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Grass, let's use this race to raise one another
up—to the highest of heights!

text_block_list.name: Grass Wonder
text_block_list.text:
Let's! The Yasuda Kinen is in June—I'll challenge
you there.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: I'm looking forward to it!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Goodness... Grass is amazing...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Heheh! ♪ This year looks like it's going to be a
blast!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
How could I not be! Running with the newer
students is going to be so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, by the way, have you decided what race
we're going to shoot for next?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to run with Grass in June, but that
doesn't mean I won't be racing until then, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She wants to have all the fun she can this year, so
it's only natural that we challenge some of the
toughest races out there...
choice_data_list: Let's shoot for the Osaka Hai!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Oooh! The biggest event of the spring!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'm gonna kick it into full gear beneath
the blooming cherry trees!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our next race set, a new year with
Maruzensky begins.
